findings: Run dir created upstream; launcher only creates subdirs (pids, scripts, logs, commanders, collab)
Collab ledgers (proposals/reviews/improvements/consensus/broadcasts.jsonl) initialized as empty files
swarm-state.json and child-agents.jsonl use plain write, not atomic temp+rename
Propose->review->improve->consensus flow declared in protocol but not enforced by launcher
Re-launching same RUN_ID overwrites existing telemetry files
